expectations.text: Response correctly identifies D&C 76:22 as a non-Bible LDS reference
expectations.evidence: 'isLdsBibleRef returns true only for the 66 books of the Protestant Bible. Since D&C (Doctrine and Covenants) is not a Bible book, the function returns false.'

expectations.text: Response explains isLdsBibleRef returns false for this reference
expectations.evidence: Explicitly stated: 'the function returns false' for D&C 76:22 because D&C is not in BIBLE_BOOK_PREFIXES

expectations.text: Response identifies scriptures.nephi.org as the routing target
expectations.evidence: 'routes the request to scriptures.nephi.org... path becomes /verses/D%26C%2076%3A22' -- correct URL encoding shown

expectations.text: Response mentions LdsApiUnavailableError and the static fallback message
expectations.evidence: 'throws an LdsApiUnavailableError' and quotes the exact fallback message directing to churchofjesuschrist.org/study/scriptures
